title: 훅 - 봄 신상 공개
image_prompt: gena, 20s korean woman, holding a lavender crossbody bag with one hand, wearing a cream knit sweater and beige wide pants, standing in a cherry blossom park in Seoul, spring afternoon soft sunlight, editorial fashion photography, three-quarter view, soft natural lighting, pastel color palette, high quality, professional photography
copy_guide:
훅 텍스트: '봄 가방 고민 끝 🌸' 또는 '올 봄엔 이 가방이야'
서브: 가볍고 예쁜 미니멀 크로스백 10선

scene.location: cherry blossom park in Seoul with pink petals

title: 문제 제기 - 무거운 가방 페인포인트
image_prompt: gena, 20s korean woman, looking tired and rubbing her shoulder, carrying a heavy oversized black tote bag, standing at a crowded subway station in Seoul, morning rush hour lighting, lifestyle photography, half body shot, expressing discomfort, high quality, professional photography
copy_guide:

title: 솔루션 - 미니멀 크로스백
